title: Export File Threat Hunting Rules
description:
The Threat Hunting Rules connector enables the export of YARA, Sigma, and Snort rules in .zip format. 
It offers two export modes: exporting a complete set of YARA, Sigma, and Snort indicators or exporting a single YARA, Sigma, or Snort indicator. 
This connector ensures efficient management of indicators by facilitating their storage and transfer while ensuring compliance with cybersecurity standards.
short_description: The Threat Hunting Rules connector enables the export of YARA, Sigma, and Snort rules in .zip format.
